raw_consumer_statement: For the months of XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX and XXXX there is a charge/an unauthorized charge of {$14.00} for the XXXX website, which should not have been charged to my credit card account. Totalling approximately {$75.00} dollars for these months. I never authorized the XXXX  to charge my citi card, as such there never should have been any charge to my account, because the XXXX XXXX only charges {$1.00} for a subscription moreover, any subscription was cancelled the same day activated. Therefore I do not want to replace my Citi Card, I am requesting the reversal of those charges of {$14.00} plus interest to be credited/refunded back to my Citi credit card totaling over {$75.00}.
